description: CompositionWhite and black check knee-length cargo shorts with a zippered and buttoned Fit, loops on waist, big side pocket on the left, small side pocket on the right, mock pocket flaps at the back, oversewn pocket on right thigh near hem with brand name and zippered pocket on the left thighFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washPerfect for those casual, relaxed days, these cargo shorts from Tribord and designed to give you that comfort in style. Chequered in the traditional shades of white and black, this knee-length cargo short has a fabric waist that sits comfortably snug and is held in place with a zip and button mechanism. Multi-pocketed, it allows you comfortably stash away your essentials like your wallet and iPod with ease. Team this with comfortable and intelligent tees for a casual day, or colourful beach shirts when on a vacation and find yourself relaxing in style.Model Statistics1. The model wears trousers, length of 42"2. Height-5.11", Waist-31"
